name: iHeartMedia, Inc.
summary: iHeartMedia, Inc. is the number one audio media company in the U.S. by consumer reach. It operates 868 broadcast radio stations across approximately 160 markets, the iHeartRadio digital streaming platform, a leading podcast publishing business, Premiere Networks syndication, Total Traffic & Weather Network, Katz Media Group media representation, and RCS Sound Software. The company serves advertisers across national, regional, and local levels with data-driven solutions including its SmartAudio platform.

products.name: iHeartRadio
products.description: Digital streaming and broadcast radio platform available on 500+ platforms including mobile, smart speakers, and automotive dashboards.

products.name: SmartAudio
products.description: Suite of data targeting, attribution, and analytics products for broadcast radio advertisers with programmatic ad-buying solutions.

products.name: Premiere Networks
products.description: National radio network producing, distributing, or representing 200+ syndicated radio programs for 6,700+ station affiliates.

products.name: Total Traffic & Weather Network
products.description: Broadcast service providing traffic and weather content and advertising revenue generation.

products.name: Katz Media Group
products.description: Full-service media representation business serving the audio and media industry.

products.name: RCS Sound Software
products.description: Provider of scheduling and broadcast software and services to the radio industry.

products.name: BIN: Black Information Network
products.description: Broadcast news network focused on Black community information and content.

partnerships.description: Nielsen provides audience measurement and market rankings for iHeartMedia's broadcast radio stations.
iHeartMedia subsidiary Triton measures digital listening hours for the audio industry.
Podtrac ranks iHeartMedia as the number one podcast publisher in the U.S. across 19 content categories.
Shareablee measures iHeartMedia's social media footprint of over 345 million fans and followers.
